Related Entities

  • hospital YUKON KUSKOKWIM DELTA REG HOSPITAL
  • snf YUKON KUSKOKWIM ELDER'S HOME 2-star, 18 beds
  • condition Visits to doctor for routine checkup within the past year among adults Prevalence: 63.6%
  • condition Cholesterol screening among adults Prevalence: 69.6%

  • condition Lack of social and emotional support among adults Prevalence: 36.5%
  • condition Mammography use among women aged 50-74 years Prevalence: 57.1%
  • condition Mammography use among women aged 50-74 years Prevalence: 57.2%
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
